rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies two confirmed alphabetical ordering violations in TauCeti.lean: FieldTheory.IntermediateField.Quadratic is listed after NumberTheory.Multiquadratic.SquareClass (F < N), and Multiquadratic.SquareClass is placed before NumberTheory.EffectiveBounds.* (E < M); acting on Review 1 fixes these real issues that a maintainer of a well-organized aggregator file would want corrected.
